join_confirm: By joining, you agree to the <1> Terms of Service </1> and <3> Privacy Policy </3>.
sign_up_confirm: By signing up, you agree to the <1> Terms of Service </1> and <3> Privacy Policy </3>.
must_be_valid_email: Email must be a valid email
pass_error: Password must be at least 8 characters, include UPPER/lowercase and numbers
newsletter: Yes, I'd like to learn more by email.
newsletter_warn: (We will never sell or transfer your information to third parties.)
title: title
save_snapshot: Would you like to save the snapshot?
saving_snapshot: Saving the snapshot to workspace Assets
exit_meeting_confirm: Are you sure you want to exit the meeting?
room_limit_reached: Room limit has been reached, you will need to wait until some participants leave the meeting
check_firewall: Check with your IT administrator if firewall is blocking access to ports 19090, 19091 and 19093
try_dif_network: Try connecting from a different network
issues_title: What were the issues you've encountered?
likes_title: What did you like about the experience?
quietAudio: Audio was too quiet or too loud
appreciate_feedback:
We appreciate you taking the time to give us feedback and will work to
          address the issues you've listed.
read_agree: This meeting will be recorded. Please read and agree the terms and conditions below.
able_disable: You will still be able disable/enable your camera and microphone during the meeting as needed
invite_by_email: Invite Participants by Email (separated by commas)
auth_required_label: When enabled, guests need to sign in to join the meeting.
allow_assets_label: When disabled, only the host can upload and share assets into a meeting.
enable_recording_label: When enabled, meetings will begin recording automatically at the start. Leave disabled to start and stop recording manually as the host.
require_consent_label: Guests are asked to agree to terms and conditions of being recorded before joining a meeting with recording enabled.
require_host_label: When disabled, guests can join without a host. When enabled, the host must admit guests, and the meeting ends when the host leaves.
no_assets_associated: There are no assets associated with this workspace yet
name: name
notes_will_deleted: All notes associated with this asset will be deleted when layout is changed
avatar_label: This is how other participants will see you when you join from a VR Headset
end_date_in_future: End date must be in future
end_must_after_start_date: End date must come after start date。
start_must_before_end_date: Start date must come before end date
separate_emails: Separate each email with a comma
account_already_exists: Account with that email already exists.
this_email_not_registered: {{email}} - This email is not a registered. Please invite the guest to signup before adding them to an authenticated meeting.
confirm_was_sent: Confirm message was sent to your email.
email_may_take_check_spam: Email should arrive within 2 minutes; check spam folder if not received
verification_success: Your account was verified. You can log in now
please_login_to_access_meet: Please login to access this meeting
requesting_superfreeze_confirm: Requesting a SuperFreeze will pause the 360° video stream for all participants
would_you_like_keep_superfreeze_as_asset: Would you like to keep the SuperFreeze as an asset?
allow_meet_no_host_tip: When enabled, guests can be in the meeting without a host present.
allow_storage_tip: When enabled, Hosts and Guests can use storage-related features, including the Asset Library.
allow_meet_recording_tip: When enabled, Hosts may use Meeting Recording features, including the capture of video and audio of all users in the meeting. Recordings are saved as a new asset in the meeting and in the Host's Asset Library.
settings_page_tip: These default settings are used for new Workspaces across your organization.
settings_page_tip_lock: Click <1></1> to prevent users from changing these settings in their own workspaces.
public_workspace_tip: When enabled, anyone with the workspace link has Viewer access to the workspace and its assets. (Note: Non-collaborators will not see meeting info / join button)
host_deactivate_tip:
Once a host license is deactivated, that host will no longer have
 access to their Workspaces or Asset Library
host_update_confirm: Would you like to {{action}} this license?
new_host_will_receive_email: The new host will receive an invitation via email
new_host_status_change_tip: Status of new host will change to “Active” after they create a new password for their account.
host_deactivate_confirm_message: This host has workspaces in their account. Would you like to delete those workspaces or transfer them to selected host account?
reset_temp_pass_text:
Enter the email address associated with your$t(avatour)
 account and the temporary password you received, then
 choose and confirm a new password. Your password must
 be 8 characters long and contain upper and lower case letters and numbers.
reset_pass_text:
Choose and confirm a new password. Your password must 
 be 8 characters long and contain upper and lower case letters and numbers.
reset_pass_success_text: Success! Your password has been changed. You may now use your new password to log in to your$t(avatour) account.
reset_host_password_text:
<1>Are you sure you want to reset the password for {{email}}?</1> <1>This will disable their current password and send them an email
with instructions for setting a new password.</1>
 <1>Note: Password reset email links expire after 24 hours.</1>
forgot_password_success_text:
If an account with this email exists, a password reset link has been sent. Please <1> check
 your spam folder </1> if you do not receive it in your inbox.
forgot_password_success: A request to choose a new password has been sent.
forgot_password_label:
Enter the email address associated with your$t(avatour)
 account and you will receive a link to reset your password.
forgot_password_email_error: Oops! Something went wrong while trying to reset your password. Please try again later or reach out to <0>support@avatour.live</0> for assistance.
spectators_allowed_tip: When enabled, guests can use the spectator code to join a meeting without a microphone or webcam. Spectators use chat to communicate with others in the meeting.
enable_notifications_label: When enabled, workspace collaborators will receive email notifications for activity such as asset uploads, notes, and comments.
password_enabled_tip: When enabled, participants must enter a password to join the meeting.
change_domain_contact: To change your domain, please contact <0>support@avatour.live</0>
set_domain_contact: You have no custom domains. Please contact <0>support@avatour.live</0> to request a new custom domain.
logo_custom_info: PNG or JPG format with a tranparent background. Must be between 400px and 1200px wide.
square_icon_custom_info: PNG or JPG format. Must be 400px x 400px.
background_image_custom_info: JPG or PNG format. Must be at least 1500px wide and 1200px tall.
background_image_360_custom_info: JPG or PNG format. Must be an equirectangular 360° image that is at least 3000px wide.
overlay_color_custom_info: Enter RGB or HEX value to choose a color. This will only be used on the login screen.
device_auth_success: Device Authorized. You are now logged in on your device.
device_login_title: Enter the 6 symbol code shown on the capture device:
allow_forbidFaceBlur_tip: Protect privacy by blurring faces in video.
enable_faceBlurEnabled: Enable face blur in live 360 captures
enable_faceBlurEnabled_label: Protect privacy by blurring faces in video.
allow_igloo_tip: You can toggle Igloo projection during meeting by accessing 'More' -> 'Igloo projection'
waiting_for_host: Waiting for Host to start the meeting...
delete_invitation_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this meeting?
delete_collab_confirm: Do you want to remove {{name}}({{email}}) from the workspace collaborators?
cannot_include_yourself_error: You cannot include yourself in list
exit_workspace_confirm: Do you want to exit to workspaces?
delete_workspace_confirm: You sure you want to delete this workspace?
finish_signUp_text: To finish creating your new Avatour account, please enter your name and choose a password
finish_signUp_text_success: You successfully finished sign-up. You can login with new credentials now.
interrupt_uploading_confirm: This will interrupt uploads that are in progress. Are you sure you want to continue ?
reset_password_expired: The link to reset password has expired. Please re-enter your email to receive a new link.
resend_invitation_confirm: Your invitation link has expired. Would you like us to resend the invitation ?
workspace_not_found: This workspace is not active or you do not have access.
join_archived_meeting_error: This workspace has been archived. Please contact workspace owner.
email_not_registered: The email address {{email}} is not a registered Avatour user.
invite_create_account_confirm: Would you like to invite them to create an account?
tooltip_roi_distance: Travel distance is estimated as the great circle distance between the capture device location and each remote participant's location, multiplied by 2 to account for round trip travel. Location data is derived from GPS, browser location, or IP address lookup.
tooltip_roi_costs: Costs are estimated based on a 2022 CNET survey of domestic travel prices for various destinations in the USA.
tooltip_roi_time: Travel time is estimated based on average speed of typical car, train, and air travel, plus reasonable overhead for e.g., transfers and security.
tooltip_roi_co2: CO2 emission reductions are estimated based on 2019 data from the UK Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy.
tooltip_roi_trees: Trees equivalent represents the number of trees that would need to be planted to sequester the same amount of CO2 emissions.
roi_title: Based on the <1>{{participantsUsed}}</1> participants with known locations, this meeting avoided a total of <3>{{miles}} miles</3> of air travel.
roi_title_global: Based on the <1>{{participantsUsed}}</1> participants with known locations, all meetings combined avoided a total of <3>{{miles}} miles</3> of air travel.
onsite_user_tip: In the same location as the 360° camera? Use On-Site mode to show details with your mobile camera, view remote participants, and share assets.
please_connect_headphones: Please connect headphones or a bluetooth headset before unmuting.
unable_connect_avatour: Unable to connect to Avatour. Please try joining from a different network or personal device.
user_already_in_meeting: You're already logged in on another device or browser tab. Close the other session, or join here as a guest using the meeting code.
unable_access_mic_check: Unable to access microphone. Please check your browser permissions and ensure microphone is not in use by another app or tab.
upload_access_denied: Upload Access Denied: This action is restricted to users belonging to the same organization.
paused_video_for_note: has paused the video to make a note.
blur_faces_tip: Enabling face blur is permanent and cannot be undone.
meeting_password_tip: This meeting is password-protected. Please enter the meeting password below to continue
